title: SimulationProfile
description: Mode-specific simulation configuration. Defines stop/target/horizon/cost parameters per trading mode.

profile_version.description: Version of this profile configuration. Bumped on parameter changes.

mode.description: Trading mode this profile applies to.

max_holding_bars.description: Maximum bars to hold before time-exit.

ambiguity_margin_r.description: Minimum R gap to declare a best action (avoids ambiguous classification).

min_action_edge_r.description: Minimum edge in R terms to prefer directional action over NO_TRADE.

mae_penalty_weight.description: Weight for MAE penalty in composite utility.

cost_penalty_weight.description: Weight for cost penalty in composite utility.

time_penalty_weight.description: Weight for time-to-MFE penalty in composite utility.

no_trade_default.description: If true, NO_TRADE is the default when outcome is ambiguous.
